introSection: Caterpillar is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark currently owned and travelled by Irish showman Jim Murray. It debuted in August 2017.
fullText:
Caterpillar is a travelling steel kiddie roller coaster built by Turkish manufacturer Güven Lunapark currently owned and travelled by Irish showman Jim Murray. It debuted in August 2017.

Yellow track with unpainted supports.




 * Trip report from Richard Bannister
